name: @lazyit/agent
description: lazyit server reporting agent — Linux inventory collector (ADR-0074, Phase 2)

scripts.compile:x64: bun build --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 --define process.env.APP_VERSION="\"${APP_VERSION:-$(git describe --tags --always 2>/dev/null || echo dev)}\"" --outfile dist/lazyit-agent-x64 src/index.ts
scripts.compile:arm64: bun build --compile --target=bun-linux-arm64 --define process.env.APP_VERSION="\"${APP_VERSION:-$(git describe --tags --always 2>/dev/null || echo dev)}\"" --outfile dist/lazyit-agent-arm64 src/index.ts
scripts.compile: export APP_VERSION="${APP_VERSION:-$(git describe --tags --always 2>/dev/null || echo dev)}"; bun run compile:x64 && bun run compile:arm64
